## Sample context

> Cosmic rebalancing; Mystra withdraws. Laeral Silverhand's Chosen-of-Mystra power is permanently diminished — concealed since.
> c. 1482–1487 DR — Second Sundering.** Mystra's withdrawal cost Laeral Silverhand the bulk of her Chosen-of-Mystra power. She has concealed it for two decades.
> The **Spellplague** a century past pulled the Feywild close to Toril, and crossings between worlds quietly multiplied. With the **Weave healed** and Mystra's return, those crossings have *stabilized rather than closed*…
